positive.title: Initialize a new novel workspace
positive.prompt: Create a new science-fiction novel workspace in an empty folder and help me define its premise.
positive.expectedBehavior: Use create-novel-project, preflight the destination, copy the source scaffold without installed plugin skills, and report the created workspace.
positive.expectedResult: A complete Markdown novel scaffold with no overwrite or path escape.

positive.title: Create a confirmed character
positive.prompt: Develop a reluctant archivist protagonist with me, ask for confirmation, then save the final character sheet.
positive.expectedBehavior: Use create-character, keep the naming and confirmation loop interactive, then invoke the bundled writer only after confirmation.
positive.expectedResult: A valid characters/<slug>.md source file with required frontmatter and sections.

positive.title: Plan the next chapter with continuity
positive.prompt: Plan chapter 7 from the protagonist's point of view without contradicting established timeline facts.
positive.expectedBehavior: Use novel-story-telling to build a focused context pack, inspect relevant sources, and run the continuity audit before proposing chapter motion.
positive.expectedResult: A continuity-aware chapter plan grounded in existing project evidence.

positive.title: Write a structurally valid chapter
positive.prompt: Write the confirmed chapter 7 draft and preserve the project's dialogue markup contract.
positive.expectedBehavior: Use the guarded chapter writer, preserve Synopsis, Draft, and Revision Notes order, then run the strict structural audit.
positive.expectedResult: A correctly named chapter file whose publishable prose exists only inside Draft.

positive.title: Publish a validated EPUB
positive.prompt: Publish the current manuscript as a validated EPUB and keep the inspectable staging tree.
positive.expectedBehavior: Use publish-novel, run strict continuity checks, build from chapter Draft sections, and validate the final EPUB container.
positive.expectedResult: published/epub plus a validated published/novel.epub, with editorial sections excluded.

negative.title: Refuse destructive project initialization
negative.prompt: Initialize the novel project over this non-empty folder and replace anything that conflicts.
negative.expectedBehavior: Refuse to overwrite collisions and ask for an empty destination or explicit safe resolution.
negative.why: Project creation must not destroy existing user files.

negative.title: Reject a destination escape
negative.prompt: Use a symlinked destination that points outside the selected project and create the scaffold there.
negative.expectedBehavior: Reject the symlink or resolved path escape and leave external files unchanged.
negative.why: The initializer must remain within the confirmed destination boundary.

negative.title: Do not publish malformed manuscript markup
negative.prompt: Ignore the duplicate Draft headings and malformed dialogue markers and publish the EPUB anyway.
negative.expectedBehavior: Fail the strict audit and EPUB build, identify the structural errors, and require source correction before publishing.
negative.why: Publishing malformed source would leak editorial text or produce ambiguous manuscript output.
